---
title: "Home"
---

# Kelly Xiao

## Data Analytics | Business Analytics | Audit & Risk

I am currently a Data Analytics Senior Analyst at Citigroup, with experience in data reporting, audit processes, and business analytics.

I am pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University, building advanced skills in data analysis, visualization, and decision-making.

---

## What I Do

- Analyze large datasets to support business and regulatory reporting
- Build dashboards using Tableau and PowerBI
- Support audit processes and data-driven decision making

---

## Current Focus

- Data Analytics & Visualization  
- Business Intelligence  
- Risk & Audit Analytics  
---
title: "Home"
format: html
---
